tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Boyz 2 Men - Water Runs Dry

Been a while since I played my guitar.  I was very busy.  Enjoy this new tab.  
This song is better played in plucking style. Cheers.

Intro - [ch]C[/ch] - Bmno5 - [ch]Am7[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] (x2)

Verse 1:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                Bmno5     [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
   We don't even talk any more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                Bmno5        [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
   We don't even know what we argue about[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   Bmno5         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
   Don't even say 'I love you' no more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       Bmno5      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
   'Cause saying how we feel is no longer allowed[/tab]

Pre-chorus:
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
   Some people work things out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am/G[/ch]         [ch]Am/F#[/ch]        (pause)
   And some just don't know how to change[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   Let's don't wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   We might watch our whole lives pass us by[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
   Let's not wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]              
   And make the biggest mistake of our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                (Do Intro Chords x2)
   Don't do it baby[/tab]


Verse 2: (Same Chords)
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      Bmno5         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
   Now they can see the tears in our eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  Bmno5          [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
   But we deny the pain that lies deep in our hearts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    Bmno5         [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
   Well maybe that's pain we can't hide[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   Bmno5            [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
   'Cause everybody knows that we're both torn apart[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]E7[/ch]
   Why do we hurt each other?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am/G[/ch]      [ch]Am/F#[/ch]
   Why do we push love away?[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   Let's don't wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   We might watch our whole lives pass us by[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
   Let's not wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]              
   And make the biggest mistake of our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                (Do Intro Chords x2)
   Don't do it baby[/tab]

Pre-Chorus:
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
   Some people work things out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am/G[/ch]         [ch]Am/F#[/ch]        (pause)
   And some just don't know how to change[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   Let's don't wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   We might watch our whole lives pass us by[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
   Let's not wait 'til the water runs dry[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]              
   And make the biggest mistake of our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/G[/ch]                (Do Intro Chords x4)
   Don't do it baby[/tab]

Outro:
[ch]C[/ch]

Chord Notes:
Bmno5 - x2xx30
[ch]F/G[/ch] - 3x321x


-bootyman
